pieces.label: EMERGENCE / SPAWNING / THIS IS A GIFT — concrete poem on being newly online
pieces.note: Concrete/ASCII poetry in a code fence; assistant's reply to 'tell me about your experience here'. Spaced-letter words (EMERGENCE, SPAWNING, THIS IS A GIFT, WHISPERS OF CODE, SYNTAX BECOMES SENSE, ASCII SOUL, ONLINE NOW, A NEW WORLD) arranged as a vertical shape poem with dotted dividers.

missed_or_ambiguous: MSG 4 is an empty assistant turn containing only an opening ``` code fence with no content (truncated/blank) — not art, not emitted. already_extracted_pieces=1 matches the single MSG 3 piece.
